attributes.action: No animal consumed in the UK should be Partially stunned or not stunned at all.
attributes.additional_details: Causing unnecessary pain, inhumanely to an animal is not British and wrong.
attributes.background: Enforce stronger animal rights laws, making non stunning, or partially stunning completely illegal.

rejection.details:
Ban non-stun & recoverable stun slaughter of animals
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762116
